diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -9,27 +9,32 @@
         self.pi0_policy = pi0_policy

         

     @classmethod

-    def from_pretrained(cls, model_name_or_path):

-        # Load the original Pi0 policy

-        pi0_policy = PI0Policy.from_pretrained(model_name_or_path)

+    def from_pretrained(cls, pretrained_model_name_or_path, **kwargs):

+        # Load the original PI0 policy

+        pi0_policy = PI0Policy.from_pretrained(pretrained_model_name_or_path, **kwargs)

         # Wrap it with our custom wrapper

         return cls(pi0_policy)

-        

+    

     def forward(self, batch, reduction="mean"):

         return self.pi0_policy.forward(batch, reduction=reduction)

-        

+    

     def select_action(self, batch):

         return self.pi0_policy.select_action(batch)

-        

+    

     def predict_action_chunk(self, batch):

         return self.pi0_policy.predict_action_chunk(batch)

-        

+    

     def get_params(self):

-        return self.pi0_policy.parameters()

-        

-    def get_num_parameters(self):

-        return sum(p.numel() for p in self.pi0_policy.parameters())

-        

-    @property

-    def config(self):

-        return self.pi0_policy.config
+        return self.pi0_policy.get_params()

+    

+    def train(self, mode=True):

+        self.pi0_policy.train(mode)

+        return self

+    

+    def eval(self):

+        self.pi0_policy.eval()

+        return self

+    

+    def to(self, device):

+        self.pi0_policy.to(device)

+        return self
